title: AI & Future Tech
description: Artificial intelligence, space tech, and modern innovations

questions.question: Which company created ChatGPT?
questions.explanation: ChatGPT was created by OpenAI and launched in November 2022.

questions.question: What does GPT stand for in ChatGPT?
questions.explanation: GPT stands for Generative Pre-trained Transformer, a type of large language model.

questions.question: Which company launched the first reusable orbital rocket?
questions.explanation: SpaceX's Falcon 9 became the first orbital rocket to land and be reused.

questions.question: What is Bitcoin?
questions.explanation: Bitcoin is the first decentralized cryptocurrency, created in 2009 by Satoshi Nakamoto.

questions.question: What year did Tesla release its first car, the Roadster?
questions.explanation: The Tesla Roadster was first delivered in 2008 as the first highway-legal electric car from Tesla.

questions.question: What technology does blockchain use to secure transactions?
questions.explanation: Blockchain uses cryptographic hashing to create an immutable chain of transaction records.

questions.question: Which AI image generator created controversy by winning an art competition in 2022?
questions.explanation: A Midjourney-generated image won the Colorado State Fair art competition in 2022.

questions.question: What is the name of Elon Musk's brain-computer interface company?
questions.explanation: Neuralink aims to develop implantable brain-computer interfaces.

questions.question: Which Google AI famously beat the world champion at the board game Go?
questions.explanation: AlphaGo by DeepMind beat world champion Lee Sedol in 2016.

questions.question: What does NFT stand for?
questions.explanation: NFT stands for Non-Fungible Token, a unique digital asset on a blockchain.

questions.question: Which company developed the AI assistant Alexa?
questions.explanation: Alexa is Amazon's voice assistant, launched with the Echo speaker in 2014.

questions.question: What was the name of SpaceX's first crewed mission to the ISS?
questions.explanation: Crew Dragon Demo-2 in May 2020 was SpaceX's first crewed mission to the ISS.

questions.question: Which cryptocurrency is known for using 'smart contracts'?
questions.explanation: Ethereum, created by Vitalik Buterin, introduced programmable smart contracts.

questions.question: What AI tool can generate realistic images from text descriptions?
questions.explanation: DALL-E by OpenAI generates images from text prompts using AI.

questions.question: How many users did ChatGPT reach in its first 2 months?
questions.explanation: ChatGPT reached 100 million users in just 2 months, the fastest-growing app in history.
